cause_analysis.narrative: The Secret Studio - Microblading Eyebrows Headspa Eyelashlift Suwanee Atlanta churned on 2026-03-12 after 369 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-02-04 via email — 36 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 36 day(s) before churn via email. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-06 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: Performance report and Calendly link\n\nBody: Hi Sakshi, As we discussed last time, we will stop service in…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-07 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: Performance report and Calendly link\n\nBody: Yes Julie the service have been compl On Sat, 7 Mar 2026 at 1…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
